evidence_stage.final_test_basis: Final MECH-057 adjudication requires integrated behavioral evidence with responsibility-bearing intervention traces, not toy proxy runs alone.
evidence_stage.proxy_interpretation: Current MECH-057 probes are proxy mechanistic pressure tests and should not be read as final ethical-agency verdicts.

items.description: Extract evidence from six key papers to assess whether basal ganglia implement three distinct gating loops (sensorium/theta-thought/action-commitment) or a single action gate with three criteria. Papers: O'Reilly & Frank 2006 (PBWM), Hazy/Frank/O'Reilly 2007, Aron et al. 2007 (STN hyperdirect), Brittain & Brown 2014 (beta oscillations), Buckner et al. 2008 (DMN), Crick 1984 / Zikopoulos & Barbas (reticular nucleus thalamus).
papers_to_extract: O'Reilly & Frank (2006) Making working memory work — PBWM model, BG gates PFC WM via Go/NoGo
Hazy, Frank, O'Reilly (2007) Towards an executive without a homunculus — three-loop BG hierarchy
Aron et al. (2007) Triangulating a cognitive control network — STN hyperdirect, beta suppression
Brittain & Brown (2014) Oscillating to a halt — beta as hold signal, STN beta and status quo
Buckner et al. (2008) The brain's default network — mPFC-hippocampal axis, DMN suppression by task
Crick (1984) / Zikopoulos & Barbas — reticular nucleus as inter-loop thalamic gating switch
items.status_reason: Registered 2026-02-27. As of 2026-05-07: all 6 originally listed papers extracted (Aron 2007, Brittain & Brown 2014, Buckner 2008, Crick 1984, Hazy/Frank/O'Reilly 2007, O'Reilly & Frank 2006). Plus 14 supplementary entries (Haber 2008/2016, Alexander 1990 x2, Redgrave 1999, Mink 1996, GPR 2001, Wouterlood 2018, etc.). 20 entries total: 11 supports / 5 mixed / 4 weakens; lit_conf 0.776; quadrant plausible_unproven. Pin retained for future re-extraction passes if BG-loop architecture evolves; not currently actionable from a literature standpoint. Re-verified 2026-05-17 (lit-pull reconcile-only pass, user-directed): all 6 named papers confirmed still present as substantive entries (summaries 244-359 words, confidence 0.62-0.82). Directory now 23 entries (14 supports / 5 mixed / 4 weakens); lit_conf 0.791; quadrant unchanged plausible_unproven. Growth since 2026-05-07 (20->23 entries) came from unrelated supplementary passes (Morris 2015, McAlonan 2000, Ahrens 2015 added 2026-05-16), not the 6 pinned papers. Literature base is saturated; the binding blocker is exp_conf=0 (zero experimental evidence) -- Q-019 cannot leave plausible_unproven via literature alone. No new searches warranted; pin retained per user_notes.
items.title: Three-Gate BG Architecture: Literature Extraction (Q-019)
items.user_notes: Pinned: survives backlog regeneration. Do not auto-delete.
